title: MSC India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: MSC India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the MSC India family as a Warehouse Manager in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MSC India:
MSC India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MSC India!
